reasoning: The primary limiter for Koren is poor lactate clearance, as indicated by his 9.3% power decline from 5-min to 20-min. Given the extended rest period, we will integrate specific over-under intervals to strengthen his aerobic capacity and fatigue resilience, crucial for achieving the target wattage on sustained climbs like the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
